ChangeRequest.name: Compliance with article 129 of CRR indicator and Asset class according to CRR, Article 129
ChangeRequest.comment:
### Overview
The attribute `Compliance with article 129 of CRR indicator` (entity type `Asset pool (subject to a Covered bond programme)`) has been wrongly assigned to the domain _Primary asset cover pool_ which is the same as the attribute `Asset class according to CRR, Article 129.` The two attribute shared also the same abbreviation so just one is then included in the input layer.
### Contact person
@Arianna.Nuvoli
### Description of change request
_Assign attribute `Compliance with article 129 of CRR indicator` the the domain Compliance with article 129 CRR type and change the abbreviation._
### Summary of impacted LDM objects/attributes
Entity type: `Asset pool (subject to a Covered bond programme)`
Attribute: `Compliance with article 129 CRR type`
![image.png](/uploads/2d7f81ef996193c27a2f69bf9f3f5efe/image.png){width=250 height=164}
### Forward Engineering considerations
_Update table `ASST_PL`_
### Before closing checklist
- [ ] Assignee for review - [ ] Assignee to close - [ ] Any other actions to be taken
